name: [GRV-API] Critical Exception Spike Detection
query: sum(last_10m):sum:trace.django.request.errors{service:grv-api,env:prod,error.type:500 OR error.type:502 OR error.type:503 OR error.type:504}.by('error.type','django.view') > {{.Env.CRITICAL_ERROR_THRESHOLD | default "20"}}

options.escalation_message: CRITICAL: High volume of server errors. Service may be down or severely degraded.
